'''shotangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubfast|tubfast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubfast|tubfast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shotangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotangithi|shotangithi]] || [[word:shotangiji|shotangiji]] || [[word:shotangishi|shotangishi]] || [[word:shotangiki|shotangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotanguthuthu|shotanguthuthu]] || [[word:shotangujuju|shotangujuju]] || [[word:shotangushushu|shotangushushu]] || [[word:shotangukuku|shotangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotanguthu|shotanguthu]] || [[word:shotanguju|shotanguju]] || [[word:shotangushu|shotangushu]] || [[word:shotanguku|shotanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotangufthuf|shotangufthuf]] || [[word:shotangufjuf|shotangufjuf]] || [[word:shotangufshuf|shotangufshuf]] || [[word:shotangufkuf|shotangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotangethe|shotangethe]] || [[word:shotangeje|shotangeje]] || [[word:shotangeshe|shotangeshe]] || [[word:shotangeke|shotangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotangothotho|shotangothotho]] || [[word:shotangojojo|shotangojojo]] || [[word:shotangoshosho|shotangoshosho]] || [[word:shotangokoko|shotangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotangotho|shotangotho]] || [[word:shotangojo|shotangojo]] || [[word:shotangosho|shotangosho]] || [[word:shotangoko|shotangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotangofthof|shotangofthof]] || [[word:shotangofjof|shotangofjof]] || [[word:shotangofshof|shotangofshof]] || [[word:shotangofkof|shotangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfthĂŻf|shotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfjĂŻf|shotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfshĂŻf|shotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfkĂŻf|shotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shotangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shotangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shotangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shotangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfthĂŻf|shotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfjĂŻf|shotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfshĂŻf|shotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfkĂŻf|shotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfthĂŻf|shotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfjĂŻf|shotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfshĂŻf|shotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotangĂŻfkĂŻf|shotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotangĂŠthĂŠ|shotangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shotangĂŠjĂŠ|shotangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shotangĂŠshĂŠ|shotangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shotangĂŠkĂŠ|shotangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotangathatha|shotangathatha]] || [[word:shotangajaja|shotangajaja]] || [[word:shotangashasha|shotangashasha]] || [[word:shotangakaka|shotangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotangatha|shotangatha]] || [[word:shotangaja|shotangaja]] || [[word:shotangasha|shotangasha]] || [[word:shotangaka|shotangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotangafthaf|shotangafthaf]] || [[word:shotangafjaf|shotangafjaf]] || [[word:shotangafshaf|shotangafshaf]] || [[word:shotangafkaf|shotangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shotangasha|shotangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotangshĂ«sha|shotangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotangrosha|shotangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotangmusha|shotangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotangyasha|shotangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotangnkshĂ«sha|goshotangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotangnkrosha|goshotangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotangnkmusha|goshotangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotangnkyasha|goshotangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shotatangasha|shotatangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotatangshĂ«sha|shotatangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotatangrosha|shotatangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotatangmusha|shotatangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotatangyasha|shotatangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotatangnkshĂ«sha|goshotatangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotatangnkrosha|goshotatangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotatangnkmusha|goshotatangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotatangnkyasha|goshotatangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shetĂŠngasha|shetĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shetĂŠngshĂ«sha|shetĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shetĂŠngrosha|shetĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shetĂŠngmusha|shetĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shetĂŠngyasha|shetĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshetĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goshetĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshetĂŠngnkrosha|goshetĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshetĂŠngnkmusha|goshetĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshetĂŠngnkyasha|goshetĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shotfangasha|shotfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotfangshĂ«sha|shotfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotfangrosha|shotfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotfangmusha|shotfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotfangyasha|shotfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotfangnkshĂ«sha|goshotfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotfangnkrosha|goshotfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotfangnkmusha|goshotfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotfangnkyasha|goshotfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
